title: geropogon hybridus
intro: Geropogon hybridus, also known as the woolly heads or woolly cudweed, is a plant species that belongs to the dandelion family (Asteraceae) and is a hybrid of Geropogon spp. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Geropogon hybridus is often used as a tea or tincture, and it can also be used as a poultice or added to creams and ointments for topical application.
